title: Kisflower 12Pcs Yellow Artificial Dancing Orchids Gypsophila Cherry Blossom Flowers for Home Decoration
features: Orchid petals: high quality silk, Stems: steel wire + plastic.(VASE NOT INCLUDE)
Height: 38.2"/97CM. 12pcs individual long stem yellow orchids flowers per package. They can be used for wreaths decor, farmstyle decor, flower arrangements, centerpiece decor, floral bouquet.
Fake Dancing orchids stems are easily bendable to fit vases and manipulated to your desired style. You can also cut the stem with a good pair of scissors or wire cutters.
The long stem yellow artificial flowers are suitable for dining room, livingroom, bedroom, table, kitchen, wedding, home, party, fireplace mantle, garden, office decor.
If you have any problems, please feel free to contact us by e-mail. We will serve you within 24 hours.
description: Product Description Kisflower is a flower brand with a product line covering artificial roses, artificial tulips, artificial hydrangea, artificial dancing orchids, artificial peony, artificial plants, etc. We are committed to bringing artificial flowers and plants to more people who love life. Advantages: 12 individual stems orchid flowers Keep for a long time Easily bendable for DIY Do not need careful care Kisflower 12Pcs Artificial Orchids Flowers Color : white, blue, purple, pink, yellow, red Package : 12pcs single stem silk orchid flowers Height : 38.2"/97CM Vivid orchid flowers The colors of orchid flowers are vibrant. They can brighten up your room and your day. Let your home be filled with flowers. Realistic and natural looking High-quality silk vibrant color natural looking Multiple usages Orchid flowers are suitable for making centerpiece, brides bouquet, flower arrangements, cake flowers, wreath decor etc. The Best Choice for DIY Orchid arrangements are perfect for home, office, wedding, party, baby shower, festival, etc decoration. Notifications: Size : All sizes are measured manual,please allowed 1-3CM errors. Color : The color of the flowers may have slight differences due to different lighting conditions or locations, please check carefully before your purchase. During transportation, the flowers may be squeezed. You can use a hot blow dryer to reshape the flower heads. Artificial flowers should not be exposed to direct sunlight for a long time.
